title: Peripheral Blood Mononuclear Cells (PBMC) and plasma isolation from whole peripheral blood
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5d622","text":"This protocol describes isolation of PBMC from human whole peripheral blood samples by density gradient centrifugation, using One SepMate-50ml tube (https://www.stemcell.com/sepmate-trade-hassle-free-pbmcs-in-just-15-minutes.html), followed by freeze and thaw protocol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":149,"length":80}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"6B32D2B4FD704910A83799288586FD20","url":"https://www.stemcell.com/sepmate-trade-hassle-free-pbmcs-in-just-15-minutes.html"}}}}
creator: Miloje Savic
